description: PDFMaker is an online PDF conversion and document-management service for converting, compressing, merging, extracting, and rotating PDF and office/image files. Its site presents end-user PDF tools, and an AnyPDF MCP endpoint is available on the api subdomain.
summary: pdfmaker.to exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://api.pdfmaker.to/mcp; no public HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
